name: Birmingham
description: Where cosmopolitan refinement meets historic elegance. Birmingham offers a walkable tapestry of premier culinary experiences, high end retail, and distinguished architecture.

name: Bloomfield Hills
description: A sanctuary of privacy and prestige. Rolling hills and winding roads reveal architectural masterpieces and estates of unparalleled grandeur.

name: Royal Oak
description: A dynamic fusion of modern energy and community spirit. Royal Oak presents a vibrant lifestyle for the discerning urbanite.

name: Troy
description: The perfect blend of suburban luxury and metropolitan convenience. Top-rated schools and world-class shopping define this premier destination.

name: Sterling Heights
description: A community on the rise with diverse housing options and exceptional amenities. Experience the best of Macomb County living.

name: Washington Twp
description: A picturesque community blending rural charm with upscale living. Known for spacious lots, beautiful parks, and a peaceful atmosphere.
